name: Premium Indian Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Clean, crisp quinine bitterness with light citrus notes from natural spring water.

name: Mediterranean Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Floral and aromatic with rosemary, thyme and citrus; lower quinine than Indian.

name: Light Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Half the calories of the Indian tonic; clean and neutral, lets the gin shine.

name: Aromatic Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Warm aromatic spices including angostura bark; bold and complex.

name: Elderflower Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Delicate elderflower sweetness with a clean quinine backbone.

name: Cucumber Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Fresh cucumber with light citrus; pairs beautifully with floral and contemporary gins.

name: Citrus Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Zesty lemon and lime notes over a clean tonic base.

name: Classic Tonic Water
flavorDescription: The original tonic — sharper carbonation, pronounced quinine bitterness, classic G&T base.

name: Botanically Brewed Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Naturally fermented with herbal botanicals; complex depth beyond standard tonics.

name: Yuzu & Malabar Pepper Tonic
flavorDescription: Distinctive Japanese yuzu citrus with a warm pepper finish; excellent with Japanese gins.

name: Burma Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Made with Cinchona bark from Burma; intensely aromatic and full-bodied.

name: 1724 Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Sourced from the Andes at 1724m altitude; delicate minerality, light and elegant.

name: Cucumber Tonic Water
flavorDescription: English garden cucumber; crisp and clean with a vegetal freshness.

name: Tonic Water
flavorDescription: German premium tonic with fine bubbles and a balanced bittersweet profile.

name: Natural Indian Tonic Water
flavorDescription: Light, crisp quinine bitterness with natural spring water; versatile pairing tonic.
